title: Washing Machine Anti Interference Capacitor 0,47µF 16A/40°C 275V 50/60Hz with the Original Code 00623842 623842 9000 676768 for Bosch for Siemens - Warranty 10 Years - MONTERAL
features: COMPATIBILITY - The washing machine anti interference capacitor 0,47uF has the original code 00623842 623842, 00181928 181928, 9000 676768 for Bosch for Balay for Constructa for Siemens for Neff.

CHARACTERISTICS - Capacitance 0,47uF + 2 x 22000 pF. Inductance 2 x 1 mH. Rated voltage 275V and rated current 16A at 40°C. Operating frequency is 50/60Hz. Resistance 680 kOhm. Operating temperature is -25°C to +100°C.
SIZE - Length 72 mm, width 35 mm, height 40 mm. Connections using 4 x 6.3 mm AMP connectors.
CONSTRUCTION - The filter housing is made of durable, heat-resistant plastic that insulates and protects internal components. A metal bracket provides stability and reliability.

FUNCTIONALITY - The capacitor is designed to reduce electromagnetic interference that can affect the operation of the washing machine, also to protect the appliance from power surges and voltage fluctuations.
description: Surge Protector for Washing Machine 0.47µF 10A/70°C 275V 50/60Hz with Original Code 00623842 623842 9000 676768 for Bosch for Siemens
